Suddenly , the dog jumped up and started running around the room , surprising Ben . ** _ Ben stood up , looking around for a way to calm the dog down . The dog seemed to be playing a game , and Ben was caught in the middle of it . _ As Ben tried to catch the dog , he stumbled and fell , ending up on the floor . The dog , now more energetic than ever , continued to run around the room . Ben sat up , looking exasperated , as he tried to figure out how to handle the situation . _ Cameron , dressed in a red dress , entered the room , concerned by the commotion .
